instructions: Show one target body part in the header. Spawn moving information nodes. The player shoots the node whose information matches the target body part.

bodyParts.label: Brain
bodyParts.info: Controls thinking, memory, emotions, speech, movement, breathing, and how the body responds to the world.

bodyParts.label: Heart/Chest
bodyParts.info: Pumps blood through the body, delivering oxygen and nutrients while helping keep the body alive.

bodyParts.label: Left Shoulder
bodyParts.info: Connects the arm to the upper body and allows lifting, reaching, rotating, and wide-range arm movement.

bodyParts.label: Right Shoulder
bodyParts.info: Helps the arm move upward, backward, forward, and side to side with a wide range of motion.

bodyParts.label: Left Hand/Wrist
bodyParts.info: Used for gripping, writing, typing, lifting small objects, and making precise movements.

bodyParts.label: Right Hand/Wrist
bodyParts.info: Helps control grip strength, object handling, finger movement, and positioning for daily tasks.

bodyParts.label: Left Knee
bodyParts.info: Acts as a hinge that lets the leg bend and straighten for walking, running, jumping, and standing.

bodyParts.label: Right Knee
bodyParts.info: Supports body weight and absorbs impact during movement, especially while running or climbing stairs.

bodyParts.label: Left Foot/Ankle
bodyParts.info: Supports balance, absorbs impact, and helps push the body forward during walking, running, or jumping.

bodyParts.label: Right Foot/Ankle
bodyParts.info: Helps control balance, direction, and movement when standing, walking, or moving across uneven surfaces.
